title: MineTrek: A Next Generation
description: Mine Trek: A Star Trek TNG fan Production
body:
![Name thingy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a76497bba746995f6270f759f4472fa8139ef85f.png)

[Click Here for mod video. 🖖](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16pmJcEu_FtkLrtvU1Ukn81Sl8v4BbtW5/view)

This is a Star Trek Fan Mod for Minecraft,

Mod Features:
Phasers,
Tricorder,
Comunicators,
Hyposprays,
Borg (Assimalates Villagers),
Holodeck (Nonfuctional, Yet),
Android (Nonfunctional, Yet),
Crafting recipes for (almost) all Items,
Space,
Spaceships,
Spacelab structure,

Future Updates:
bugfixes,
VISOR,
Q,
Warp Core,
Replicators,
Photon Torpedoes,
PADD,
Tractor Beam.   

 Legal Disclaimer,
Star Trek and all related marks, logos, and characters are solely owned by CBS Studios Inc. This fan production is not endorsed by, sponsored by, nor affiliated with CBS, Paramount Pictures, or any other Star Trek franchise. This is a non-commercial, fan-made mod created for the community's enjoyment. No copyright infringement is intended. 

Built with: Mcreator,
Audio from 101Soundboards,

Feel Free To Use This In Your Modpack!
